events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need assess described field condition. But user gave no actual photos, only scenario: progress photos show current checkpoint scope finished for this area. Remaining visible work is cleanup, labeling, or follow-on finish work outside checkpoint being scored. Reference ACI 347. Stage rough-complete. Need decide pass/fail/needs_more_info. Since no specific defects described, and scope finished, likely pass. But must be careful: form build & bracing residential, prescriptive code and manufacturer instructions. No component conditions flagged. We judge from evidence, but evidence is text saying finished. So decision pass, risk low, percent_complete maybe 95 (cleanup remains). component_conditions empty. findings empty? Could include no significant findings. actions empty or none. references ACI 347. Need valid JSON. Ensure no prose outside JSON.
